name: Dudu Bites Dog Biscuit 500g (200pcs)
shortDescription: Dudu Bites – our 100% natural tasty treat and topper for your dog! 10 Week Shelf- life.
description: Katango Dudu Bites dog biscuits offer homemade goodness, crafted with care for your furry friend. These treats are both delightful and nutritious, approved by a licensed canine nutritionist. Free from strange preservatives, artificial flavors, or colors, and without any artificial fillers, they contain only all-natural ingredients made with love by a dedicated dog enthusiast. Perfect for treating your dog, as a snack, or as a tasty addition to their regular meals. Dudu Bites: Dry biscuit treat / topper All natural, no additives Protein: 27% Fats: 8% Fiber: 7% Max Ash: 4% Wholefood ingredients: Black Soldier Fly Larvae (Insect protein) Zucchini Carrots Potatoes Sweet Potatoes Spinach Apples Eggs Bananas Beef Liver Flaxseeds Rosemary Parsley GRAIN FREE!
